plan_defects.problem: PC-C1b (a P0) targets eligible_matches_for_send, which has 0 production callers, and its 'filter upstream of promotion without touching the runner' mechanism is unrealizable — the sole live promotion is inside the runner (humansearch_cdp_run.py:162). Live send face is actually covered by C1a+C3; one of the 5 P0s does not independently close a live leak.

Duplication map claimed complete after self-correction is still missing >=5 unmerged branches with unique commits: ai-search-tdd-goal-prompt(8!), docs-drop-v4-refs(2), home-wip-20260617(2), salvage-home-wip(2), vision-fallback-recovery(1). Worse: task/docs-drop-v4-refs edits docs/ai-search/multi-position-sourcing-layer-2026-06-08.md, the exact file PC-C4b targets -> collision.

PC-C1a acceptance demands lossless dict->CapturedProfile reconstruction incl. ocr_text, but the runner dict lacks ocr_text -> 'lossless' is internally impossible (doc already hedges with fail-closed; criterion wording self-contradictory).
runner hard-exclude face (PC-C3) sits behind a 3-dep P1, so the '0순위' hard-exclude invariant is only 2/3-closed at P0.
A1/C1a/C3 bundle 2-3 tests each (agrees with V1).

three_way_agree.note: All three (T, V1, V2) agree the spec's FACTS are correct and existing tests pass (614). All three (V1 explicit, V2 explicit, T-confirmed specifics) agree the spec is NOT safe to act on as-is due to plan-level defects + uncaptured live-code bugs.

complete §2 duplication map over ALL unmerged branches (esp. ai-search-tdd-goal-prompt=8 commits, docs-drop-v4-refs collides with PC-C4b target file) before any gate-0.5 salvage/delete.

re-specify PC-C1b: the live send-face hard-exclude belongs at the runner promotion (humansearch_cdp_run.py:162) = merge into PC-C3, or explicitly scope C1b to the FUTURE automated send gate; do not count it as an independent live-leak-closing P0.
split PC-A1, PC-C1a, PC-C3, PC-D2a, PC-F4a, PC-G2 so each has exactly one testable acceptance criterion (harness gate 1).
reject blank/whitespace boolean_query for boolean channels (fail-closed); reproduce before scheduling.
reword PC-C1a acceptance: reconstruct available fields + fail-closed on missing, drop 'lossless incl. ocr_text'.
promote the runner hard-exclude face to P0 or fold into C1a so all live leak faces close at P0.
handle already-running event loop in run_harvest_cycle; relevant to PC-D5 when the live driver is wired.
ignore — codex sandbox temp-dir artifact; real suite is 614 passed exit 0.

final_verdict: The Spec's factual backbone is CONFIRMED accurate by all three independent verifiers, and existing code passes 614 tests. However the Spec is NOT safe to act on as-is: fix 3 plan defects (complete the duplication map incl. docs-drop-v4-refs collision + the 8-commit ai-search-tdd-goal-prompt branch; re-specify the misframed P0 PC-C1b; split 6 non-atomic slices) and add 2 confirmed hard-exclude matcher bypasses (전문대 whitespace, 프리랜서 zero-width) as slices — these compound the already-confirmed unwired hard-exclude invariant. Existing tests green does NOT mean the hard-exclude invariant holds: it is both unwired (0 callers) and leaky (2 reproduced bypasses).
